search.title: Ledger entries
search.selectAccountsPrompt: Select one or more accounts to search their entries.

bankImport.title: Import bank statement
bankImport.accountMismatch: This statement is for account {{iban}}. Make sure it is your bank account before importing.
bankImport.incomeAccountLabel: Income account for unmatched incoming lines
bankImport.reviewIntro: Review each line. Matched invoices and bills are pre-selected; a new supplier can be created per outgoing line.
bankImport.duplicate: Bank reference appeared in an earlier import

actions.matchInvoiceDeactivateMollie: Match invoice {{number}} and deactivate Mollie link

openingBalance.prompt: No opening balance is set yet. This statement opens at {{amount}} on {{date}}.
openingBalance.done: Opening balance set from this statement.

lineStatus.skipped_invoice_paid_via_mollie: Invoice was already paid through Mollie
lineStatus.skipped_mollie_error: Mollie link could not be deactivated — retry available
lineStatus.skipped_mollie_reconciliation_conflict: Invoice or payment changed during reconciliation

notice.voided: This ledger entry has been voided by another ledger entry.
notice.reversed: This ledger entry has been reversed by another ledger entry.
notice.correctionVoid: This ledger entry was created to void another ledger entry.
notice.correctionReverse: This ledger entry was created to reverse another ledger entry.

voidDialog.title: Void ledger entry?
voidDialog.body: Do you want to void this ledger entry? Doing so will create a new ledger entry that cancels out this one.

reverseDialog.title: Reverse ledger entry?
reverseDialog.body: This entry falls in a closed booking period. Reversing posts a new, visible ledger entry in the current open period that cancels it out; the original entry is kept unchanged.
